title: Natural Wonders and Conservation Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A very cruel or terrible act
choices: atrocity
desist
anarchy
rounds.answer: atrocity
rounds.explanation: atrocity: A very cruel or terrible act

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To shake or tremble while speaking, often from nervousness
choices: atrocity
desist
quaver
rounds.answer: quaver
rounds.explanation: quaver: To shake or tremble while speaking, often from nervousness

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To say that something is true, often without proof
choices: desist
claim
atrocity
rounds.answer: claim
rounds.explanation: claim: To say that something is true, often without proof

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A place where someone is going or something is being sent
rounds.answer: destination

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To feel or express strong disapproval of something
rounds.answer: deplore

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To use something in a way that helps you but may be unfair
rounds.answer: exploit

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The war led to many atrocities that shocked the world.
After the leader resigned, the organisation fell into anarchy.
The audacious explorer crossed the ravine without any safety equipment.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Bold and daring; willing to take risks
Done secretly because you do not want to be noticed
To shake or tremble while speaking, often from nervousness
To start a fire, or to make a feeling or interest begin
rounds.answer: Done secretly because you do not want to be noticed
rounds.explanation: He gave a furtive glance at the map before anyone noticed.

choices: Bold and daring; willing to take risks
To feel or express strong disapproval of something
To make someone angry or upset by your actions or words
To shake or tremble while speaking, often from nervousness
rounds.answer: To make someone angry or upset by your actions or words
rounds.explanation: If you keep interrupting, you will only antagonize the speaker.

choices: A wrong action that breaks a rule or law
To feel or express strong disapproval of something
To shake or tremble while speaking, often from nervousness
To start a fire, or to make a feeling or interest begin
rounds.answer: To start a fire, or to make a feeling or interest begin
rounds.explanation: Reading about the Simien Mountains kindled her interest in conservation.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: The war led to many atrocities that shocked the world.
reported speech by telling a partner or your AI Tutor what the characters in the story said.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The astute leader noticed the signs of danger before anyone else.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Sami claimed he could reach the citadel faster than anyone else.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Sami's brusque reply made the younger students uncomfortable.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'transgression' mean in this unit?
choices: A wrong action that breaks a rule or law
A very cruel or terrible act
To stop doing something
rounds.answer: A wrong action that breaks a rule or law
rounds.explanation: transgression: A wrong action that breaks a rule or law

rounds.prompt: What does 'brusque' mean in this unit?
choices: A very cruel or terrible act
To stop doing something
Speaking in a very direct and rude way, without friendliness
rounds.answer: Speaking in a very direct and rude way, without friendliness
rounds.explanation: brusque: Speaking in a very direct and rude way, without friendliness

rounds.prompt: What does 'desist' mean in this unit?
choices: A situation with no government or authority, leading to confusion
To stop doing something
A very cruel or terrible act
rounds.answer: To stop doing something
rounds.explanation: desist: To stop doing something
